C) Pyramid of energy
D) None of these
Page-248, Easy
41. Identify the pyramid
TC 100
5C 100J
PC 1000 J
PP 10.000 J
A) Pyramid of number
B) Pyramid of biomass
C) Pyramid of energy
D) None of these
Page-249, Easy
42. Identify the pyramid
2
10
20
1
A) Pyramid of number
B) Pyramid of biomass
C) Pyramid of energy
D) None of these
Page-248, Easy
14.6 Ecological succession
43. A community that is in near equilibrium
with the environment is called as
A) Pioneer community
B) Middle community
C) Climax community
D) Sere
Page-250, Easy
44. The gradual and fairly predictable change
in the species composition of a given area
is called
A) Hydrarch succession
B) Ecological succession
C) Pioneer succession
D) None of these
Page-250, Easy
